violations.text: Allergen statement is lacking on menu or point of service. PIC placed statement at point of service during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below in the barista area. Inspector observed residential units (dormitory-sized) used for storage of milk and other beverages with an ambient temperature of 44-45 degrees F. PIC informed to monitor beverage temperatures. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
Beverage cans were observed stored on the floor under the storage rack. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the milk crate used as a fan stand have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Per interview of staff, in use utensils are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the caulking on the service area sink faucets and under the cold-brew kegs have an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
